svg.title: ORM class architecture diagram
svg.desc: Class hierarchy showing Field as the parent of CharField, IntegerField, and ForeignKey. Model as the parent of User and Post. User and Post use Field subclasses. QuerySet and Database sit at the bottom layer.

g.onclick: sendPrompt('Explain the Field base class and its descriptor methods')
sendPrompt('How does CharField validate and what is max_length?')
sendPrompt('How does IntegerField validate its value?')
sendPrompt('How does ForeignKey work and what is ReverseRelation?')
sendPrompt('What methods does the Model base class provide?')
sendPrompt('How does the User model use Field descriptors?')
sendPrompt('How does Post use ForeignKey to relate to User?')
sendPrompt('How does QuerySet build SQL lazily?')
sendPrompt('How does the database module manage the sqlite connection?')
